name: Way of Life Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Stewing beef, cut into bite-size pieces
1 package Lipton's Onion soup mix - stir before dividing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a covered casserole dish.
2. Bake at 300°F for 3 hours.
Way of Life Stew is great served cold during the colder months.
